- additional_services: Any extra services with costs. Provided as None booked plus a note; since it’s optional, it’s acceptable – considered specified.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown. Provided total booked cost, budget limit, remaining – sufficiently specified.
All 7 items appear and are sufficiently detailed according to the format.
